sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي النَّاسُ وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا عَلَى مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi provode mnogo vremena na društvenim mrežama.
sentences.translationEn: People spend a long time on social media sites.

sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ صُوَرَهُمْ وَأَخْبَارَهُمْ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici dijele svoje fotografije i vijesti s prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: Users share their photos and news with friends.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمِنَصَّاتُ فِي التَّعَرُّفِ عَلَى ثَقَافَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove platforme pomažu u upoznavanju novih kultura.
sentences.translationEn: These platforms help in learning about new cultures.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنْ يَجِبُ أَنْ نَسْتَخْدِمَهَا بِحَذَرٍ وَاعْتِدَالٍ.
sentences.translation: Ali, moramo ih koristiti oprezno i umjereno.
sentences.translationEn: But we must use them with caution and moderation.
